sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Arista Networks’ Duda sells shares worth $3.85 million
feed.summary: Kenneth Duda, President and CTO of Arista Networks Inc (NASDAQ:ANET), sold 29,990 shares of common stock for approximately $3.85 million on January 20, 2026, under a pre-arranged trading plan. He also exercised options to acquire 30,000 shares. The sales included shares for the benefit of Duda's children and a trust, highlighting the company's strong financial health and upcoming earnings report on February 12.

feed.title: Did Concerns Over Earnings Quality and Dilution Just Shift Take-Two Interactive Software's (TTWO) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Recent commentary on Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) highlights concerns about slowing sales growth, cash outflows, and share dilution, despite increasing revenue. This has led analysts to question the company's ability to convert growth into sustained shareholder value. For investors, the focus has shifted from headline revenue beats to earnings quality and cash generation as key short-term catalysts.

feed.title: United Rentals: A Strong Contender in the Equipment Rental Market
feed.summary: This article highlights United Rentals (NYSE: URI) as a strong contender in the equipment rental market, offering insights from Motley Fool's expert analysts. While not among their top 10 immediate stock picks, the analysis encourages potential investors to explore market trends and investment opportunities related to the company. The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor has a strong track record of identifying high-growth stocks.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group (PFG) Reports $781 Billion in Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFG) reported $781.0 billion in Assets Under Management (AUM) as of December 31, 2025. This figure includes contributions from disposed operations, and a 1.5% positive impact on AUM due to foreign currency translation and market performance. The company highlights its exposure to small, mid-cap, and international equities, as well as high yield and preferred fixed income securities.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Shares Down 1.7% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) shares dropped 1.7% during mid-day trading on Thursday, with trading volume significantly below its daily average. This comes after the company reported quarterly EPS that missed consensus estimates, although it did increase its quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings for MRK are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" but some major firms raising price targets and maintaining "Buy" ratings.

feed.title: TikTok Seals Deal to Create US Venture With Oracle, Silver Lake
feed.summary: TikTok and its Chinese parent ByteDance Ltd. have officially created a US venture involving Oracle Corp., Silver Lake Management LLC, and MGX. This deal aims to transfer parts of TikTok’s US business to non-Chinese owners, securing the app's future in the United States and avoiding a nationwide ban. The agreement was first announced by the Trump Administration in September.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) Shares Up 5.9% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) saw its shares climb 5.9% on Thursday, with trading volume significantly above average. Analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $16.00, despite the company remaining unprofitable and recent insider share sales totaling nearly $29.7 million. The company, which specializes in high-energy-density lithium-ion batteries, recently beat quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Voyager Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Voyager Technologies, Inc. announced its Q3 2025 financial results, reporting net sales of $39.6 million, including 31% growth in its Defense and National Security segment. The company also announced a net loss of $(16.3) million, a total backlog of $188.6 million, and expects FY 2025 revenue to be at the high end of its $165 million to $170 million guidance range. Key strategic initiatives include acquisitions, investments in next-generation technologies, and continued progress on the Starlab program.

feed.title: The Truth About Bilibili Inc: Is This Viral Anime Stock a Hidden Cheat Code or Just Copium?
feed.summary: This article examines Bilibili Inc. (BILI), a popular Chinese platform for anime and gaming culture, to determine if its stock is a worthwhile investment. While the platform boasts strong community engagement and a loyal Gen Z user base in China, the stock is categorized as a high-risk, speculative bet due to its volatility, past price crashes, and the ongoing challenge of consistently converting engagement into profit. Investors are advised to exercise caution and recognize that hype does not equate to a guaranteed strategy.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Robert Mauch Sells Shares of Cencora Inc (COR)
feed.summary: Robert Mauch, President & CEO of a Cencora Inc branch, sold 5,096 shares of the company on January 20, 2026, reducing his holding to 66,726 shares. This transaction is part of a pattern of 31 insider sells and no buys over the past year. Cencora Inc's stock was trading at $354.73, indicating it is modestly overvalued compared to its GF Value of $276.88.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Elizabeth Porter Sells 3,000 Shares of Leidos Holdings Inc (LDOS)
feed.summary: Elizabeth Porter, Sector President at Leidos Holdings Inc (LDOS), sold 3,000 shares of the company on January 20, 2026, reducing her holdings to 38,575 shares. This sale is part of a trend over the past year with no insider buys and 10 insider sells. The stock is currently trading at $192.21, with a market cap of $24.733 billion, and is considered modestly overvalued based on its GF Value of $152.27.

feed.title: The Truth About Devon Energy Corp: Is DVN the Sleeper Stock Everyone’s Sleeping On?
feed.summary: The article explores Devon Energy Corp (DVN) as a potential "sleeper stock," highlighting its connection to oil and gas prices, its variable dividend strategy, and its position against competitors like Pioneer Natural Resources. It discusses whether DVN is a sound investment for those seeking exposure to US energy and cash returns, or a volatile play tied to fossil fuels. The author suggests DVN is a tactical investment for dividend hunters and energy bulls, provided investors understand the risks of commodity price exposure and variable dividends.

feed.title: How to get Harry Styles Amex presale tickets
feed.summary: Harry Styles has announced his "Together, Together Tour 2026," a limited global run of residencies. American Express cardholders can get early presale access to tickets, which are expected to sell out quickly due to the limited number of cities and a 30-night Madison Square Garden residency in New York City. The article details how to sign up for the Amex presale, the different ticket types available, and recommends several American Express cards for those looking to secure tickets.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Stock Just Flashed A Signal: Game-Changer Buy Or Overhyped Trap?
feed.summary: GE HealthCare is gaining attention as a significant player in the medical technology sector, described as a "pure-play health company" involved in imaging, monitoring, and digital/AI solutions for healthcare. The article asks if the stock is a smart buy or an overhyped trap, concluding that while it's not a meme stock for quick gains, its role in modern healthcare infrastructure and potential in AI and digital health makes it a solid long-term investment for those seeking steady growth in the healthcare tech sector. It contrasts GE HealthCare with competitors like Siemens Healthineers, highlighting GE HealthCare's strong presence in US markets and its narrative resonating on US social platforms.

feed.title: Safehold stock downgraded by Morgan Stanley on muted origination activity
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley downgraded Safehold (NYSE:SAFE) from Equalweight to Underweight, lowering its price target to $14.00 from $16.00 due to concerns over muted origination activity. The firm highlighted reduced ground lease investments, a high dividend payout ratio (exceeding 100% of AFFO), and ongoing litigation as key risks. Despite recent strategic maneuvers like a new term loan and leadership change, Morgan Stanley forecasts a potential 35% dividend cut in 2027.

feed.title: TrustCo Bank Corp NY Posts Robust Earnings Momentum
feed.summary: TrustCo Bank Corp NY reported robust Q4 earnings, with net income increasing 38% year over year, driven by strong net interest income growth and margin expansion. The bank saw steady loan and deposit growth, along with significant share repurchases and consistent dividend payouts. While non-performing loans slightly increased and capital ratios edged lower, management views these as manageable within a healthy financial framework.

feed.title: Alberta Authorities Investigate Suncor Worker Death at Fort Hills Site
feed.summary: Alberta authorities are investigating the death of a worker at Suncor Energy's Fort Hills oil sands site, which occurred on January 13 when heavy equipment sank into muskeg. This incident marks the first fatality at a Suncor site since 2022, reigniting concerns about the company's safety management following previous deadly incidents and subsequent management changes. Wall Street analysts are forecasting a potential fall in Suncor's stock price over the next 12 months, with an average 1-year target of 49.83 USD.

feed.title: Domain sees record audience growth under CoStar group ownership
feed.summary: Domain has reported significant audience growth since its acquisition by CoStar Group, achieving a sixfold increase in audience volume compared to its nearest competitor. The company's residential platforms averaged 8.1 million Australians monthly in Q4 2025, marking its strongest performance on record, while its commercial platform also saw substantial user and listing view increases. President Jason Pellegrino noted reaching 9 million Australians in October as a historic moment and expects continued engagement with listings.

feed.title: Gale Klappa stepping down from WEC Energy
feed.summary: Gale Klappa is set to retire as WEC Energy chairman in May 2026 after leading the company for over 22 years. The article, available for preview, indicates what this leadership change means for the Midwest's largest utility. This announcement comes alongside information about upcoming business events and related articles concerning WEC Energy and Wisconsin's energy landscape.

feed.title: Globe, Nokia widen tie-up to offer new digital tools to businesses
feed.summary: Globe Telecom, Inc. has expanded its partnership with Nokia Corp. to provide businesses with broader access to network application programming interfaces (APIs) through Nokia's Network Exposure Program. This collaboration aims to create new opportunities for enterprises to use advanced network capabilities across various sectors and to safeguard against fraud, particularly in banking and enterprise. The initiative builds on a previous partnership focused on developing security applications to combat mobile banking fraud.

feed.title: HII Celebrates One Year of Newport News Shipbuilding Operations in Goose Creek
feed.summary: HII is celebrating one year of Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS) operations in Goose Creek, South Carolina, where the facility has exceeded production targets for 2025 and demonstrated strong support for U.S. Navy programs. NNS Charleston Operations leverages a strategic location within South Carolina's growing maritime ecosystem to expand capacity and access skilled labor. HII is also advancing its distributed shipbuilding initiative by partnering with numerous shipyards and exploring international collaborations to further increase capacity and meet national security demands.

feed.title: Wingstop (WING): Our Calculation of Intrinsic Value
feed.summary: This article presents a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis for Wingstop Inc. (WING), calculating an intrinsic value of $11 per share compared to its current price of ~$285. The analysis highlights that despite Wingstop's compounding unit growth and strong business model, its current valuation reflects a significant growth premium with a limited margin of safety for value-oriented investors. The author notes that the company's asset-light franchise structure and digital ordering adoption drive strong free cash flow, but conservative DCF assumptions show it trading materially above its intrinsic value.

feed.title: Brown-Forman Declares Cash Dividend (May 23, 2024)
feed.summary: Brown-Forman Corporation has announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.2178 per share for its Class A and Class B Common Stock. This dividend is payable on July 1, 2024, to shareholders of record as of June 7, 2024. The company, a long-standing member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats, has a history of paying quarterly cash dividends for 80 years and increasing them for 40 consecutive years.

feed.title: Prudential to raise stake in Malaysia life insurer holding firm to 70% for $377 million
feed.summary: British insurer Prudential announced it will increase its stake in Sri Han Suria, the holding company for Prudential Assurance Malaysia, to 70% by acquiring an additional 19% for approximately $377 million. This move follows a settlement over a dividend claim and reflects Prudential's commitment to the Malaysian market. The transaction has been approved by Malaysia's central bank and is expected to close shortly.

feed.title: Alcoa (AA) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Alcoa (AA) reported strong Q4 2025 results with revenue up 15% sequentially and adjusted EBITDA increasing by $276 million, driven by higher metal prices. The company emphasized its strategic progress, including the San Ciprian smelter restart and advancing low-carbon aluminum initiatives. Management expects continued positive momentum in 2026, benefiting from regional market dynamics and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: Victoria's Secret & Co. (NYSE:VSCO) Shares Down 4.3% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Victoria's Secret & Co. (NYSE:VSCO) saw its stock price drop by 4.3% on Thursday, trading at around $62.24 on light volume. Despite this decline, the company recently beat quarterly earnings expectations and issued positive FY2025 guidance. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for VSCO, with several firms adjusting price targets upwards.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On January 22nd, 241.49K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.27 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 22nd, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) saw significant options trading, with 241.49K contracts traded. Call options represented 58.27% of the total, while put options accounted for 41.73%. The open interest for TQQQ.US reached 1.27 million contracts, which is 78.38% of its 30-day average.

feed.title: A Look At RTX (RTX) Valuation After New Defense Contracts And Sector Tailwinds
feed.summary: RTX Corporation is under valuation scrutiny following recent defense contract wins, including Tomahawk missile modernization and air traffic control radar upgrades. Despite strong share price returns over the past year, the stock's current P/E ratio and discounted cash flow model suggest it may be overvalued compared to industry peers and its estimated fair value. Investors are advised to consider the potential for limited upside if market sentiment cools or if contract growth slows.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess F5 (FFIV) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: This article analyzes F5 (FFIV) after recent share price weakness, employing Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio valuation methods. The DCF model suggests F5 is slightly undervalued by approximately 4.5%, while comparing its current P/E of 22.0x against a proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 23.7x indicates it is modestly undervalued. The article concludes that while traditional metrics suggest F5 is fairly to modestly undervalued, investors can use "Narratives" to apply their own financial forecasts and perspectives to determine the stock's true value.

feed.title: F5’s EVP Fountain sells $291k in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Thomas Dean Fountain, EVP of Global Services & Strategy at F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV), sold 1,110 shares of company stock for $291,630 on January 20, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite this insider sale, InvestingPro data indicates aggressive share buybacks and a strong cash position, with the company appearing undervalued per its Fair Value assessment. F5 is also expanding its AI security solutions and application delivery services, receiving positive analyst upgrades and price target increases recently.

feed.title: Check your email: Impacted Dollar General shoppers alerted to class action settlement
feed.summary: Dollar General has reached a class action settlement regarding allegations of charging customers different prices than those advertised in stores. Customers who shopped at Dollar General between October 10, 2016, and November 19, 2025, may be eligible for a cash payment or an "in-store benefit." The deadline to file a claim is April 13.

feed.title: Intuitive wins FDA clearances for cardiac procedures on da Vinci 5
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical has received FDA clearance for several cardiac procedures on its latest da Vinci 5 surgical robotics system, using non-Force Feedback instruments. CEO Dave Rosa highlighted a measured rollout due to the complexity of minimally invasive cardiac surgery, with plans for further clearances and investment in dedicated training and instrumentation. Despite the growth in cardiac procedures performed with its earlier systems, the company sees significant expansion opportunities with da Vinci 5, aiming to support a wider range of cardiac surgeries.

feed.title: Burke & Herbert Financial (NASDAQ:BHRB) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results, Beats on EPS but Misses on Revenue
feed.summary: Burke & Herbert Financial (NASDAQ:BHRB) reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with non-GAAP EPS of $1.98 surpassing analyst estimates of $1.91, while revenue of $86.56 million missed the $88.36 million estimate. The company announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.55 per share, payable on March 2, 2026. Despite the revenue miss, effective expense management likely contributed to the earnings beat, and the stock showed a muted immediate market reaction after a period of positive short-term performance.

feed.title: Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) Major Shareholder Buys $118,424.00 in Stock
feed.summary: A major shareholder of Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS), Daniel Asher, recently purchased 22,600 shares totaling $118,424.00, increasing his stake to over 1.89 million shares. This latest transaction is part of a sustained buying trend by Asher throughout January. The stock is currently trading around $5.31, significantly below its 52-week high, with analysts holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $21.33.

feed.title: Exicure completes Phase 2 trial milestone and plans $1 million payment to GPCR Therapeutics
feed.summary: Exicure (NASDAQ:XCUR) has achieved a key milestone by completing its Phase 2 clinical trial for a novel stem cell mobilizer, NCT05561751, under its License and Collaboration Agreement with GPCR Therapeutics Inc. This achievement triggers a $1 million milestone payment to GPCR Therapeutics, which Exicure intends to fulfill. The company, valued at $41 million, also recently reported positive results from a separate Phase 2 trial for burixafor in multiple myeloma patients and fully redeemed convertible bonds using internal cash.

feed.title: Kaplan Fox Alerts Investors of BellRing Brands, Inc. (BRBR) to a Securities Class Action Deadline on March 23, 2026
feed.summary: Kaplan Fox & Kilsheimer LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against BellRing Brands, Inc. (BRBR) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between November 19, 2024, and August 4, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that BellRing's stock price dropped significantly after the company attributed a narrowed fiscal year 2025 outlook to competitive headwinds, contradicting previous representations of strong organic growth and market share. Investors are reminded that the deadline to move the court to serve as a lead plaintiff is March 23, 2026.

feed.title: Alcoa Corp (NYSE:AA) Beats Q4 Estimates on Strong Aluminum Prices, Shares Dip on Outlook
feed.summary: Alcoa (NYSE:AA) exceeded fourth-quarter 2025 earnings and revenue estimates due to strong aluminum prices and operational execution, with adjusted EPS of $1.26 versus $0.94 estimated, and revenue of $3.45 billion versus $3.40 billion estimated. Despite these strong results, shares dipped in after-hours trading, potentially due to profit-taking or the company's cautious near-term outlook which projects sequential declines in first-quarter 2026 profitability despite increased production volumes. The company's full-year 2025 performance showed significant improvement, with net income surging to $1.17 billion.

feed.title: Investor Notice: Firm Robbins LLP Informs Investors of the BellRing Brands, Inc. Securities Class Action
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has announced a securities class action lawsuit against BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE: BRBR), alleging that the company misled investors regarding its sales performance between November 19, 2024, and August 4, 2025. The lawsuit claims that BellRing's strong sales did not reflect genuine consumer demand but rather customers accumulating excess inventory due to previous supply constraints. Following a period of destocking and a disappointing Q3 2025 financial report with a narrowed sales outlook, BellRing's stock price dropped significantly.

feed.title: Subzero Iowa forecast: Iowa American Water’s guide to prevent frozen pipes
feed.summary: Iowa American Water (NYSE: AWK) has issued guidelines to its customers in anticipation of subzero temperatures, urging them to prepare their plumbing and water meters to prevent freezing. The company advises locating and testing the main shut-off valve, insulating exposed pipes, eliminating drafts, and allowing faucets to trickle during extreme cold. Additionally, Iowa American Water plans future replacements of lead or galvanized service lines for identified properties.

feed.title: RLI CORP (NYSE:RLI) Posts Strong Q4 Beat Despite Muted Market Reaction
feed.summary: RLI CORP (NYSE:RLI) reported a strong fourth quarter for 2025, exceeding analyst expectations for both earnings per share ($0.94 vs $0.807) and revenue ($465.7 million vs $395.2 million). Despite these positive results and achieving its 30th consecutive year of underwriting profitability, the stock experienced a muted to negative reaction in after-hours trading. The company also highlighted significant full-year performance, including a 33% increase in book value per share and its 50th consecutive year of regular dividend increases.

feed.title: Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE:ALLY) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with Adjusted EPS up 62% year-over-year to $3.81 and a Core ROTCE of 10.4%, up over 300 basis points from 2024. The company achieved retail net charge-offs below 2% and saw strong growth in core businesses like retail auto and corporate finance loans, which increased by 5%. Ally expressed confidence in its strategic refresh and ability to deliver mid-teens returns despite some near-term pressures on Net Interest Margin (NIM) from lease terminations and a dynamic macro environment.

feed.title: Tractor Supply (TSCO) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) is projected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. While analysts have recently become slightly bearish, reflected in a -4.07% Earnings ESP, the company has a Zacks Rank of #3. Investors typically consider the Earnings ESP and Zacks Rank for predicting earnings beats, with a positive ESP and strong Zacks Rank often indicating a higher probability of beating estimates.

feed.title: Is Sysco (SYY) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Resilience And DCF Outlook
feed.summary: Sysco (SYY) shares are currently trading around US$76.84, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggesting an intrinsic value of approximately $161.19 per share, indicating a significant undervaluation. The company's P/E ratio of 20.3x is also below Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 25.7x, further suggesting it may be trading at a discount based on earnings. The article explains these valuation methods and introduces "Narratives" as a personalized way for investors to assess the stock's worth.

feed.title: Capital One CEO Says Capping Card Rates Threatens Recession
feed.summary: Capital One CEO Richard Fairbank has warned that capping credit card interest rates, as proposed by President Donald Trump, could lead to a US recession. Fairbank stated that such a price control would not make credit more affordable but would significantly reduce its availability for a wide range of consumers. This move, he argues, would adversely affect the economy rather than benefit consumers.

feed.title: Cooley, Jones Day Steer Clorox's $2.25B GOJO Industries Buy
feed.summary: Cooley LLP, advising Clorox Co., announced an agreement to acquire GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell hand sanitizer, for $2.25 billion in cash. Jones Day represented GOJO Industries in the transaction. The deal highlights significant legal involvement from both firms in a major corporate acquisition.

feed.title: Bank of America considers new credit card capped at 10% interest
feed.summary: Bank of America is reportedly considering offering a new credit card with an interest rate capped at 10% for one year. This consideration comes in response to President Donald Trump's call for a universal 10% cap on credit card interest rates. While banks have expressed concerns about such a cap impacting lending to high-risk borrowers, Bank of America is exploring options to address affordability for consumers.

feed.title: Hershey (NYSE:HSY) CFO Steven Voskuil Sells 1,500 Shares
feed.summary: Hershey's CFO, Steven Voskuil, sold 1,500 shares of company stock for $298,005 on January 20th, reducing his direct ownership to 52,319 shares. This transaction occurred after Hershey surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and provided FY2025 guidance. The stock is currently trading at $190.60 with a market cap of $38.65 billion and offers an annualized dividend yield of 2.9%.

feed.title: T-Mobile US to Redeem $1.5 Billion Senior Notes on February 1, 2026
feed.summary: T-Mobile US announced its plan to redeem $1.5 billion of its 4.750% Senior Notes on February 1, 2026, signaling financial stability and a future reduction in interest expenses. Deutsche Bank Trust Company Americas will serve as the trustee and paying agent for this redemption process. The company also included cautionary forward-looking statements regarding potential risks like market disruptions.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Cencora (NYSE:COR) CEO Sells 5,096 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Cencora (NYSE:COR) CEO Robert Mauch sold 5,096 shares of company stock for approximately $1.81 million on January 20th, reducing his ownership by 7.10%. The company recently reported better-than-expected earnings and revenue, raised its quarterly dividend, and holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $393.08. Institutional investors also significantly hold shares, with 97.52% of the stock owned by hedge funds and other institutional investors.

feed.title: Sallie Mae (NASDAQ:SLM) Exceeds Q4 CY2025 Expectations
feed.summary: Sallie Mae (NASDAQ:SLM) exceeded Wall Street's expectations for Q4 CY2025 revenue, with sales up 16.4% year-on-year to $454.1 million, and GAAP profit significantly above estimates at $1.12 per share. Despite missing net interest income estimates and providing slightly lower EPS guidance for 2026, the company's stock rose 4.3% following the solid quarterly results. The article notes the company's sluggish 2% annualized revenue growth over the last five years but highlights an improved 4.7% growth over the past two years.
